---
title: "Stern-Brocot Physics"
output:
  github_document: default
---

```{r setup-and-data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)

# --- 1. Configuration & Data Load ---
# Strict Prefix Naming: dir_ (Directory), file_ (File Path), dt_ (DataTable)

dir_base_data_4TB <- "/Volumes/SanDisk4TB/SternBrocot-data"

# Pipeline Directories
dir_01_raw_erasures           <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "01_harmonic_oscillator_erasures")
dir_02_densities              <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "02_harmonic_oscillator_densities")
dir_03_nodes                  <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "03_harmonic_oscillator_nodes")
dir_04_summary                <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "04_harmonic_oscillator_summary") # NEW

# Summary Files (Routing to the new dir_04_summary)
file_04_summary_erasure_distance       <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_erasure_distance_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_minimal_action_state   <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_minimal_action_state_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_minimal_program_length <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_minimal_program_length_summary.csv.gz")

if (!file.exists(file_04_summary_erasure_distance)) {
  stop("Erasure Distance Summary file not found at: ", file_04_summary_erasure_distance)
}

# In-Memory Data Tables (Peers loaded symmetrically)
dt_summary_erasure_distance <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_erasure_distance)) fread(file_04_summary_erasure_distance) else data.table()
dt_summary_minimal_action_state <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_minimal_action_state)) fread(file_04_summary_minimal_action_state) else data.table()
dt_summary_minimal_program_length <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_minimal_program_length)) fread(file_04_summary_minimal_program_length) else data.table()

# --- 2. Manual Selection Logic (Hand-Picked Momenta) ---
dt_handpicked_momenta <- data.table(
  normalized_momentum = c(0.5, 0.876, 1.065, 1.354, 1.991, 2.308, 2.467, 2.640, 2.829, 2.98, 3.268, 100.0, 200.0),
  expected_nodes = c(0:10, 29, 20)
)

# Rolling joins to find the closest actual experimental data points for each peer metric
dt_selected_erasure_distance <- dt_summary_erasure_distance[
  dt_handpicked_momenta, on = .(normalized_momentum), roll = "nearest"
]

dt_selected_minimal_action_state <- dt_summary_minimal_action_state[
  dt_handpicked_momenta, on = .(normalized_momentum), roll = "nearest"
]
```

```{r plot-1A-combined-grid-erasure-distance, echo=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=25, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# --- Plot 1A: Combined Grayscale Small Multiples (Erasure Distance) ---
render_combined_erasure_distance_grid <- function(dt_target_momenta) {
  plot_list <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    momentum_str_padded <- sprintf("%013.6f", momentum_val)
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 1. Conjugate Quanta (Left Column)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    a_base <- momentum_val / 0.5
    b_base <- 0.5 / momentum_val
    scaling_factor <- 90 / max(a_base, b_base) 
    
    ellipse_df <- data.frame(
      type = factor(c("Q-Conjugate", "P-Conjugate"), levels = c("Q-Conjugate", "P-Conjugate")),
      major = c(a_base, b_base) * scaling_factor,
      minor = c(b_base, a_base) * scaling_factor
    )
    
    p_ell <- ggplot(ellipse_df) +
      geom_ellipse(aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, a = major, b = minor, angle = 0, color = type, fill = type), 
                   alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Q-Conjugate" = "black", "P-Conjugate" = "gray60")) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Q-Conjugate" = "black", "P-Conjugate" = "gray30")) +
      coord_fixed(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(-100, 100)) +
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(legend.position = "none",
            axis.title = element_blank(), 
            axis.text = element_blank(),
            panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
            aspect.ratio = 1,
            plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
    
    if (i == 1) p_ell <- p_ell + labs(title = "Conjugate Blobs") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 2. Microstate vs. minimal_action_state (Middle Column)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    file_raw_erasures <- file.path(dir_01_raw_erasures, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasures_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    p_scat <- ggplot() + theme_void() + theme(aspect.ratio = 1, plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)) 
    
    if (file.exists(file_raw_erasures)) {
      dt_raw_found <- fread(file_raw_erasures)[found == 1]
      if (nrow(dt_raw_found) > 0) {
        p_scat <- ggplot(dt_raw_found, aes(x = microstate, y = minimal_action_state)) +
          geom_point(alpha = 0.25, size = 0.1, color = "black") + 
          theme_minimal() +
          theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
                axis.text = element_blank(),
                panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
      }
    }
    if (i == 1) p_scat <- p_scat + labs(title = "Minimal vs. Micro") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 3. Coordinate Density (Right Column)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    file_density_erasure_distance <- file.path(dir_02_densities, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasure_distance_density_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    file_nodes_erasure_distance   <- file.path(dir_03_nodes, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasure_distance_nodes_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    
    p_den <- ggplot() + theme_void() + theme(aspect.ratio = 1, plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
    
    if (file.exists(file_density_erasure_distance)) {
      dt_histogram_points <- fread(file_density_erasure_distance)
      dt_active_bins <- dt_histogram_points[density_count > 0]
      
      if (nrow(dt_active_bins) > 0) {
        max_density_height <- max(dt_active_bins$density_count, na.rm = TRUE)
        raw_coordinate_width <- if(nrow(dt_active_bins) > 1) median(diff(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm=TRUE) else 1.0
        max_coordinate_edge <- max(abs(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm = TRUE) + (raw_coordinate_width / 2)
        
        dt_active_bins[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
        pct_bar_width <- (raw_coordinate_width / max_coordinate_edge) * 100
        
        dt_skyline_outline <- rbind(
          data.table(pct_q = min(dt_active_bins$pct_q) - pct_bar_width, pct_density = 0),
          dt_active_bins[, .(pct_q, pct_density)],
          data.table(pct_q = max(dt_active_bins$pct_q) + pct_bar_width, pct_density = 0)
        )
        
        dt_node_coordinates <- if(file.exists(file_nodes_erasure_distance)) fread(file_nodes_erasure_distance) else data.table()
        if (nrow(dt_node_coordinates) > 0 && "coordinate_q" %in% names(dt_node_coordinates)) {
          dt_node_coordinates[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
        }
        
        p_den <- ggplot() +
          geom_col(data = dt_active_bins, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), width = pct_bar_width, fill = "gray85") +
          geom_step(data = dt_skyline_outline, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5, direction = "mid") + 
          geom_point(data = dt_node_coordinates, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = "black", size = 1.5) +
          coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(0, 105)) +
          theme_minimal() +
          theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
                axis.text = element_blank(),
                panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
      }
    }
    if (i == 1) p_den <- p_den + labs(title = "Erasure Density") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 4. Append row to Master List
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_ell
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_scat
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_den
  }
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  # Assemble into Final Matrix using Patchwork
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  final_grid <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 3) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "Structural Evolution of Erasure Distance",
      subtitle = "Nodes 0 through 10 and 29",
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, family = "mono"),
                    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray30"))
    )
  
  if(nrow(dt_target_momenta) > 0) print(final_grid)
}

render_combined_erasure_distance_grid(dt_selected_erasure_distance)
```

```{r plot-1B-combined-grid-minimal-action-state, echo=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=25, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# --- Plot 1B: Combined Grayscale Small Multiples (Minimal Action State) ---
render_combined_minimal_action_state_grid <- function(dt_target_momenta) {
  plot_list <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    momentum_str_padded <- sprintf("%013.6f", momentum_val)
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 1. Conjugate Quanta (Left Column)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    a_base <- momentum_val / 0.5
    b_base <- 0.5 / momentum_val
    scaling_factor <- 90 / max(a_base, b_base) 
    
    ellipse_df <- data.frame(
      type = factor(c("Q-Conjugate", "P-Conjugate"), levels = c("Q-Conjugate", "P-Conjugate")),
      major = c(a_base, b_base) * scaling_factor,
      minor = c(b_base, a_base) * scaling_factor
    )
    
    p_ell <- ggplot(ellipse_df) +
      geom_ellipse(aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, a = major, b = minor, angle = 0, color = type, fill = type), 
                   alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Q-Conjugate" = "black", "P-Conjugate" = "gray60")) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Q-Conjugate" = "black", "P-Conjugate" = "gray30")) +
      coord_fixed(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(-100, 100)) +
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(legend.position = "none",
            axis.title = element_blank(), 
            axis.text = element_blank(),
            panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
            aspect.ratio = 1,
            plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
    
    if (i == 1) p_ell <- p_ell + labs(title = "Conjugate Blobs") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 2. Microstate vs. minimal_action_state (Middle Column)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    file_raw_erasures <- file.path(dir_01_raw_erasures, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasures_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    p_scat <- ggplot() + theme_void() + theme(aspect.ratio = 1, plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)) 
    
    if (file.exists(file_raw_erasures)) {
      dt_raw_found <- fread(file_raw_erasures)[found == 1]
      
      if (nrow(dt_raw_found) > 0) {
        p_scat <- ggplot(dt_raw_found, aes(x = microstate, y = minimal_action_state)) +
          geom_point(alpha = 0.25, size = 0.1, color = "black") + 
          theme_minimal() +
          theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
                axis.text = element_blank(),
                panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
      }
    }
    
    if (i == 1) p_scat <- p_scat + labs(title = "Minimal vs. Micro") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 3. Coordinate Density & Nodes (Right Column)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    file_density_minimal_action_state <- file.path(dir_02_densities, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_minimal_action_state_density_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    file_nodes_minimal_action_state   <- file.path(dir_03_nodes, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_minimal_action_state_nodes_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))

    p_den <- ggplot() + theme_void() + theme(aspect.ratio = 1, plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
    
    if (file.exists(file_density_minimal_action_state)) {
      dt_histogram_points <- fread(file_density_minimal_action_state)
      dt_active_bins <- dt_histogram_points[density_count > 0]
      
      if (nrow(dt_active_bins) > 0) {
        max_density_height <- max(dt_active_bins$density_count, na.rm = TRUE)
        raw_coordinate_width <- if(nrow(dt_active_bins) > 1) median(diff(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm=TRUE) else 1.0
        max_coordinate_edge <- max(abs(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm = TRUE) + (raw_coordinate_width / 2)
        
        dt_active_bins[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
        pct_bar_width <- (raw_coordinate_width / max_coordinate_edge) * 100
        
        dt_skyline_outline <- rbind(
          data.table(pct_q = min(dt_active_bins$pct_q) - pct_bar_width, pct_density = 0),
          dt_active_bins[, .(pct_q, pct_density)],
          data.table(pct_q = max(dt_active_bins$pct_q) + pct_bar_width, pct_density = 0)
        )
        
        dt_node_coordinates <- if(file.exists(file_nodes_minimal_action_state)) fread(file_nodes_minimal_action_state) else data.table()
        if (nrow(dt_node_coordinates) > 0 && "coordinate_q" %in% names(dt_node_coordinates)) {
          dt_node_coordinates[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
        }
        
        p_den <- ggplot() +
          geom_col(data = dt_active_bins, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), width = pct_bar_width, fill = "gray85") +
          geom_step(data = dt_skyline_outline, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5, direction = "mid") + 
          geom_point(data = dt_node_coordinates, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = "black", size = 1.5) +
          coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(0, 105)) +
          theme_minimal() +
          theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
                axis.text = element_blank(),
                panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
      }
    }
    
    if (i == 1) p_den <- p_den + labs(title = "Minimal Action Density") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 4. Append row to Master List
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_ell
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_scat
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_den
  }
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  # Assemble into Final Matrix using Patchwork
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  final_grid <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 3) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "Structural Evolution of Minimal Action States",
      subtitle = "Nodes 0 through 10 and 29",
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, family = "mono"),
                    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray30"))
    )
  
  if(nrow(dt_target_momenta) > 0) print(final_grid)
}

render_combined_minimal_action_state_grid(dt_selected_minimal_action_state)
```

---

![Violating Bell's Theorem](man/figures/hero_bell.png)

---

```{r plot-2A-overview-scatter-erasure-distance, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
# --- Plot 2A: Overview Scatter Plot (Erasure Distance) ---
qho_backbone <- function(P) { P^2 }

if(nrow(dt_summary_erasure_distance) > 0) {
  dt_background_erasure_distance <- dt_summary_erasure_distance[node_count >= 0]
  
  p_ov_action_a <- ggplot() +
    stat_function(fun = qho_backbone, 
                  n = 1001, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(data = dt_background_erasure_distance[order(complexity_ntv)], 
               aes(x = normalized_momentum, y = node_count, color = complexity_ntv), 
               size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "black", high = "grey80", name = "Variation") +  
    geom_point(data = dt_selected_erasure_distance, aes(x = normalized_momentum, y = node_count), 
               color = "black", size = 5, shape = 21, fill = NA, stroke = 1.2) +
    geom_text(data = dt_selected_erasure_distance, aes(x = normalized_momentum, y = node_count, 
              label = sprintf("n=%d P=%.3f v=%.2f", node_count, normalized_momentum, complexity_ntv)),
              nudge_y = 0.35, size = 3, fontface = "bold", family = "mono") +
    labs(title = "Node Count vs Momentum: Erasure Distance",
         subtitle = "Continuous phase-space evolution to P=10",
         x = "Normalized Momentum (P)", y = "Nodes (n)") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 30, by=5)) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.1, 10.5), ylim = c(-0.5, 32)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
  
  print(p_ov_action_a)
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
}
```

```{r plot-2B-overview-scatter-minimal-action-state, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
# --- Plot 2B: Overview Scatter Plot (Minimal Action State) ---
if(nrow(dt_summary_minimal_action_state) > 0) {
  dt_background_minimal_action_state <- dt_summary_minimal_action_state[node_count >= 0]
  
  p_ov_action_b <- ggplot() +
    stat_function(fun = qho_backbone, 
                  n = 1001, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(data = dt_background_minimal_action_state[order(complexity_ntv)], 
               aes(x = normalized_momentum, y = node_count, color = complexity_ntv), 
               size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "black", high = "grey80", name = "Variation") +  
    geom_point(data = dt_selected_minimal_action_state, aes(x = normalized_momentum, y = node_count), 
               color = "black", size = 5, shape = 21, fill = NA, stroke = 1.2) +
    geom_text(data = dt_selected_minimal_action_state, aes(x = normalized_momentum, y = node_count, 
              label = sprintf("n=%d P=%.3f v=%.2f", node_count, normalized_momentum, complexity_ntv)),
              nudge_y = 0.35, size = 3, fontface = "bold", family = "mono") +
    labs(title = "Node Count vs Momentum: Minimal Action State",
         subtitle = "Continuous phase-space evolution to P=10",
         x = "Normalized Momentum (P)", y = "Nodes (n)") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 30, by=5)) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.1, 10.5), ylim = c(-0.5, 32)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
  
  print(p_ov_action_b)
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
}
```

```{r plot-3-program-length-evolution, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
# --- Plot 3: Program Length Summary ---
if (nrow(dt_summary_minimal_program_length) > 0) {
  
  p_prog <- ggplot(dt_summary_minimal_program_length, aes(x = normalized_momentum)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean_len, color = "Mean"), linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_line(aes(y = median_len, color = "Median"), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Metric", values = c("Mean" = "black", "Median" = "gray30")) +
    labs(title = "Evolution of Algorithmic Complexity",
         subtitle = "Mean, Median, and ±1 Standard Deviation of Minimal Program Length over Momentum",
         x = "Normalized Momentum (P)", 
         y = "Minimal Program Length (bits)") +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.1, 10.5)) + 
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold", size = 16),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "gray40"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  print(p_prog)
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
  
} else {
  cat("*(Program length summary data not yet generated)*\n\n---\n\n")
}
```

```{r plot-4A-individual-profiles-erasure-distance, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# --- Plot 4A: Profiles (Erasure Distance) ---
render_profiles_erasure_distance <- function(dt_target_momenta, dot_color = "black") {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    momentum_str_padded <- sprintf("%013.6f", momentum_val)
    
    file_density <- file.path(dir_02_densities, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasure_distance_density_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    file_nodes   <- file.path(dir_03_nodes, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasure_distance_nodes_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))

    if (file.exists(file_density)) {
      dt_histogram_points <- fread(file_density)
      dt_active_bins <- dt_histogram_points[density_count > 0]
      if (nrow(dt_active_bins) == 0) next

      max_density_height <- max(dt_active_bins$density_count, na.rm = TRUE)
      raw_coordinate_width <- if(nrow(dt_active_bins) > 1) median(diff(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm=TRUE) else 1.0
      max_coordinate_edge <- max(abs(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm = TRUE) + (raw_coordinate_width / 2)
      
      dt_active_bins[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
      pct_bar_width <- (raw_coordinate_width / max_coordinate_edge) * 100
      
      dt_skyline_outline <- rbind(
        data.table(pct_q = min(dt_active_bins$pct_q) - pct_bar_width, pct_density = 0),
        dt_active_bins[, .(pct_q, pct_density)],
        data.table(pct_q = max(dt_active_bins$pct_q) + pct_bar_width, pct_density = 0)
      )

      dt_node_coordinates <- if(file.exists(file_nodes)) fread(file_nodes) else data.table()
      if (nrow(dt_node_coordinates) > 0 && "coordinate_q" %in% names(dt_node_coordinates)) {
        dt_node_coordinates[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
      }
      
      p <- ggplot() +
        geom_col(data = dt_active_bins, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), width = pct_bar_width, fill = "grey85") +
        geom_step(data = dt_skyline_outline, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = "black", linewidth = 0.7, direction = "mid") + 
        geom_point(data = dt_node_coordinates, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = dot_color, size = 3) +
        labs(title = sprintf("Erasure Distance | Nodes: %02d | P: %3.3f | NTV: %2.2f", current_row$node_count, momentum_val, current_row$complexity_ntv),
             x = "Amplitude (%)", y = "Density %") +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(0, 105)) +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-100, 100, 50)) +
        scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold", size = 11))
      
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n---\n\n")
    }
  }
}
render_profiles_erasure_distance(dt_selected_erasure_distance, "black")
```

```{r plot-4B-individual-profiles-minimal-action-state, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# --- Plot 4B: Profiles (Minimal Action State) ---
render_profiles_minimal_action_state <- function(dt_target_momenta, dot_color = "black") {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    momentum_str_padded <- sprintf("%013.6f", momentum_val)
    
    file_density <- file.path(dir_02_densities, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_minimal_action_state_density_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    file_nodes   <- file.path(dir_03_nodes, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_minimal_action_state_nodes_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))

    if (file.exists(file_density)) {
      dt_histogram_points <- fread(file_density)
      dt_active_bins <- dt_histogram_points[density_count > 0]
      if (nrow(dt_active_bins) == 0) next

      max_density_height <- max(dt_active_bins$density_count, na.rm = TRUE)
      raw_coordinate_width <- if(nrow(dt_active_bins) > 1) median(diff(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm=TRUE) else 1.0
      max_coordinate_edge <- max(abs(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm = TRUE) + (raw_coordinate_width / 2)
      
      dt_active_bins[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
      pct_bar_width <- (raw_coordinate_width / max_coordinate_edge) * 100
      
      dt_skyline_outline <- rbind(
        data.table(pct_q = min(dt_active_bins$pct_q) - pct_bar_width, pct_density = 0),
        dt_active_bins[, .(pct_q, pct_density)],
        data.table(pct_q = max(dt_active_bins$pct_q) + pct_bar_width, pct_density = 0)
      )

      dt_node_coordinates <- if(file.exists(file_nodes)) fread(file_nodes) else data.table()
      if (nrow(dt_node_coordinates) > 0 && "coordinate_q" %in% names(dt_node_coordinates)) {
        dt_node_coordinates[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
      }
      
      p <- ggplot() +
        geom_col(data = dt_active_bins, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), width = pct_bar_width, fill = "grey85") +
        geom_step(data = dt_skyline_outline, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = "black", linewidth = 0.7, direction = "mid") + 
        geom_point(data = dt_node_coordinates, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = dot_color, size = 3) +
        labs(title = sprintf("Minimal Action State | Nodes: %02d | P: %3.3f | NTV: %2.2f", current_row$node_count, momentum_val, current_row$complexity_ntv),
             x = "Amplitude (%)", y = "Density %") +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(0, 105)) +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-100, 100, 50)) +
        scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold", size = 11))
      
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n---\n\n")
    }
  }
}
render_profiles_minimal_action_state(dt_selected_minimal_action_state, "black")
```

```{r plot-5-through-9-phase-space-scatters, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# --- Plot 5: Micro Macro ---
render_micro_macro_scatters <- function(dt_target_momenta) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    momentum_str_padded <- sprintf("%013.6f", momentum_val)
    file_raw_erasures <- file.path(dir_01_raw_erasures, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasures_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    
    if (file.exists(file_raw_erasures)) {
      dt_raw_found <- fread(file_raw_erasures)[found == 1]
      if (nrow(dt_raw_found) == 0) next
      
      p <- ggplot(dt_raw_found, aes(x = microstate, y = minimal_action_state)) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.5, color = "black") +
        labs(title = sprintf("Phase Space Erasure: P = %.6f", momentum_val),
             subtitle = sprintf("Range: [%.3f, %.3f]", min(dt_raw_found$microstate), max(dt_raw_found$microstate)),
             x = "Microstate", y = "Minimal Action State") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold"))
      
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n---\n\n")
    }
  }
}
render_micro_macro_scatters(dt_selected_erasure_distance)

# --- Plot 6: Micro Erasure ---
render_micro_erasure_scatters <- function(dt_target_momenta) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    momentum_str_padded <- sprintf("%013.6f", momentum_val)
    file_raw_erasures <- file.path(dir_01_raw_erasures, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasures_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    
    if (file.exists(file_raw_erasures)) {
      dt_raw_found <- fread(file_raw_erasures)[found == 1]
      if (nrow(dt_raw_found) == 0) next
      
      p <- ggplot(dt_raw_found, aes(x = microstate, y = erasure_distance)) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.5, color = "black") +
        labs(title = sprintf("Phase Space Erasure: P = %.6f", momentum_val),
             subtitle = sprintf("Range: [%.3f, %.3f]", min(dt_raw_found$microstate), max(dt_raw_found$microstate)),
             x = "Microstate", y = "Erasure Distance") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold"))
      
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n---\n\n")
    }
  }
}
render_micro_erasure_scatters(dt_selected_erasure_distance)

# --- Plot 7: Macro Erasure ---
render_macro_erasure_scatters <- function(dt_target_momenta) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    momentum_str_padded <- sprintf("%013.6f", momentum_val)
    file_raw_erasures <- file.path(dir_01_raw_erasures, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasures_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    
    if (file.exists(file_raw_erasures)) {
      dt_raw_found <- fread(file_raw_erasures)[found == 1]
      if (nrow(dt_raw_found) == 0) next
      
      p <- ggplot(dt_raw_found, aes(x = minimal_action_state, y = erasure_distance)) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.5, color = "black") +
        labs(title = sprintf("Phase Space Erasure: P = %.6f", momentum_val),
             subtitle = sprintf("Range: [%.3f, %.3f]", min(dt_raw_found$microstate), max(dt_raw_found$microstate)),
             x = "Minimal Action State", y = "Erasure Distance") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold"))
      
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n---\n\n")
    }
  }
}
render_macro_erasure_scatters(dt_selected_erasure_distance)

# --- Plot 8: Erasure Macro ---
render_erasure_macro_scatters <- function(dt_target_momenta) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    momentum_str_padded <- sprintf("%013.6f", momentum_val)
    file_raw_erasures <- file.path(dir_01_raw_erasures, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasures_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    
    if (file.exists(file_raw_erasures)) {
      dt_raw_found <- fread(file_raw_erasures)[found == 1]
      if (nrow(dt_raw_found) == 0) next
      
      p <- ggplot(dt_raw_found, aes(x = erasure_distance, y = minimal_action_state)) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.5, color = "black") +
        labs(title = sprintf("Phase Space Erasure: P = %.6f", momentum_val),
             subtitle = sprintf("Range: [%.3f, %.3f]", min(dt_raw_found$microstate), max(dt_raw_found$microstate)),
             x = "Erasure Distance", y = "Minimal Action State") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold"))
      
      print(p)
      cat("\n\n---\n\n")
    }
  }
}
render_erasure_macro_scatters(dt_selected_erasure_distance)

# --- Plot 9: Conjugate Ellipses ---
render_ellipses <- function(dt_target_momenta) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    a_base <- momentum_val / 0.5
    b_base <- 0.5 / momentum_val
    scaling_factor <- 90 / max(a_base, b_base) 
    
    ellipse_df <- data.frame(
      type = c("Q-Conjugate", "P-Conjugate"),
      major = c(a_base, b_base) * scaling_factor,
      minor = c(b_base, a_base) * scaling_factor
    )

    p <- ggplot(ellipse_df) +
      geom_ellipse(aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, a = major, b = minor, angle = 0, color = type, fill = type), 
                   alpha = 0.25, linewidth = 0.8) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Q-Conjugate" = "black", "P-Conjugate" = "gray60")) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Q-Conjugate" = "black", "P-Conjugate" = "gray40")) +
      labs(title = sprintf("Momentum: %3.3f", momentum_val),
           subtitle = "Action Quanta", x = "q", y = "p") +
      coord_fixed(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(-100, 100)) +
      theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none", aspect.ratio = 1)

    print(p)
    cat("\n\n---\n\n")
  }
}
render_ellipses(dt_selected_erasure_distance)
```
